characters.description:
Hail grew up with both his parents in stardust city . Hail's mother is called hyacinth and she was a jazz singer who was a rather popular and well known performer during her time , often playing in Premier establishments , clubs and bars.

Hails father was called vince . he was a talent scout and promoter , in charge of hiring talent and booking performances for many different venues. Its through there work that his parents met and fell in love .

Hails childhood was diffrent than most , because his parents lifestyles were so tightly woven into the music industry he spent his entire upbringing around the main stage . while most kids were in school or outside playing , Hail was rigging up sound equipment and pyrotechnics while rubbing shoulders with rockstars .

Hail was given his very own custom guitar on his 16th birthday called the Ruby flare , it was made by a very tallented craftsman and a friend of the family .

It was the last gift he ever received from his parents as soon after they were claimed by the ongoing war .

In the last 10 years since the war ended hes been working in the same clubs and bars as the ones he was walking through as a child , working as a roadie and setting up stages he spends his time in the background trying to keep the music that his parents loved so much , alive .

Through my love and fascination of weapons, and the requirement for them during war times, I've developed my skills which have led my life thus far. I starting as an apprentice at 16 with my uncle Baltwine. We lost him to a previous war a while ago. Since then I've put all my effort into developing my skills and finally opening my own weapon smiting business that I run with my work partner Neireena. We do weapon repair on the side as well but its not as profitable as selling our jeweled weapons. During war times I now go out to fight while she takes care of the business. Not really too fussed if my family come into it too much or not. But here's the gist. If anyone, like my little brother karther the most. Parents: still alive: Gregorian and Valaar. Siblings: Four. Older brother: Kabesh, died in a previous war and we all still mourn him. Me: second oldest, the best one of the lot Sister: Sunthares, warrior, she helps protect us along with myself Sister: Dinah, prancy princess who hasnt found her feet yet, don't like her Brother: Karther, he's just starting to become my apprentice in the business. Helping out here and there but I keep him out of trouble where I can and protect him coz ... he's my little brother.

Fallon is from a poor family living in the slums of Stardust City. Her father, Luca Vega, worked as a construction worker until he had an accident that resulted in his left foot amputated. Her mother, Alexis Vega, worked as an office cleaner until she fell ill with a lung disease. Luca and Alexis Vega have three children: Fallon (23), Selena(15), and Justin (11).

As her parents work most of their waking time to make ends meet however they can, Fallon and her siblings were often left to wander the streets of Stardust City, looking for food or something that could help their parents make a bit of extra money. But because they were on the streets most of their childhoods, they learned how rough life in the slums was and grew up getting into trouble and learning to defend themselves and steal to sell things to make money.

One day, when they were passing through the street, they looked up to see a billboard advertising Stardust City were recruiting for the military. Fallon decided she would apply and try to work her way up the ranks so she could earn enough money to move her family from the slums to inside the walls of Stardust City.

Fallon did well in her first two years of training.
Nova Sparkmore is a lad from City.
Tobias Colmb is a oldtimer from the White Cross DC
